query:
SELECT 
  u.name,
  u.email,
  l.digestType,
  l.weekKey,
  l.status,
  l.itemCount,
  l.sentAt,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(l.sentAt/1000) as sentAt_converted
FROM userEmailSendLog l
JOIN users u ON u.id = l.userId
WHERE l.weekKey = '2026W23'
ORDER BY l.sentAt ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT 
  u.name,
  u.email,
  l.digestType,
  l.weekKey,
  l.status,
  l.itemCount,
  l.sentAt,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(l.sentAt/1000) as sentAt_converted
FROM userEmailSendLog l
JOIN users u ON u.id = l.userId
WHERE l.weekKey = '2026W23'
ORDER BY l.sentAt ASC;
